context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures a Hydrogen project including proper .env variable names, createHydrogenContext usage in server.ts, Oxygen deployment via GitHub Actions, Remix defer+Suspense for streaming, @inContext directive for localization, and pinned API version.

checklist.name: Correct .env variable names
checklist.description: The .env.example file contains all four required variables: SESSION_SECRET, PUBLIC_STOREFRONT_API_TOKEN, PUBLIC_STORE_DOMAIN, and PUBLIC_STOREFRONT_API_VERSION

checklist.name: API version pinned
checklist.description: PUBLIC_STOREFRONT_API_VERSION is set to a specific dated version (e.g. '2025-01') in .env.example, not a dynamic or 'latest' value

checklist.name: createHydrogenContext storefront config
checklist.description: server.ts calls `createHydrogenContext` with a `storefront` object containing apiVersion, publicStorefrontToken (or privateStorefrontToken), and storeDomain fields sourced from env variables

checklist.name: Session initialization in context
checklist.description: server.ts includes session configuration (e.g. `HydrogenSession.init(request, [env.SESSION_SECRET])`) within the createHydrogenContext call

checklist.name: CacheLong for collections
checklist.description: The homepage loader applies `storefront.CacheLong()` to the featured collections query

checklist.name: Remix defer for non-critical data
checklist.description: The homepage loader uses `defer()` (not `json()`) to return at least one non-critical data promise for streaming, and the component uses `<Suspense>` or `<Await>` to render it

checklist.name: @inContext directive in query
checklist.description: At least one GraphQL query in the homepage route uses the `@inContext` directive with `language` and/or `country` parameters

checklist.name: Oxygen GitHub Action
checklist.description: The oxygen.yml workflow uses `Shopify/hydrogen-action@v1` (not a generic deploy action or custom script)

checklist.name: GitHub Action secrets reference
checklist.description: The oxygen.yml workflow references secrets for shop domain and CLI token (e.g. `${{ secrets.SHOPIFY_SHOP_DOMAIN }}` and `${{ secrets.SHOPIFY_CLI_TOKEN }}`)

checklist.name: Oxygen env vars beyond .env
checklist.description: SETUP_NOTES.md or equivalent documentation mentions that environment variables must be configured in Shopify admin (not only in .env) for Oxygen production deployments
